metadata.title: Meteorological and Oceanographic Satellite Data Archival Centre (MOSDAC)
metadata.abstract: Meteorological and Oceanographic Satellite Data Archival Centre (MOSDAC) is a Data Centre of Space Applications Centre (SAC) and has facility for satellite data reception, processing, analysis and dissemination. MOSDAC is operationally supplying earth observation data from Indian meteorology and oceanography satellites.
metadata.keywords: Meteorological, Oceanographic, Satellite, Data, Archival, Data Centre
